violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Plumbing under the 3-bay sink and food prep sink observed in poor repair. Pipe leaking water causing water to pool on the floor in back prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025

Per interview with PIC there is not a servsafe person present during time of inspection. Establishment shall have a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Resources provided. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety registered with RIDOH at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Observed the hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by trash can. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC relocated trash can in designated area during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was approximately 100 parts per million (ppm). Proper sanitizing procedures reviewed. PIC changed out and refreshed sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The following was not in good repair: 1. Prep cooler unit was observed with water pooling underneath the fan and ice forming inside unit. 2. Light in walk-in freezer was observed half detached from ceiling. Per interview with PIC a service order for prep unit has been placed. PIC will place an order for walk-in freezer light. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was approximately 100 parts per million (ppm). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of rodent droppings observed in front service area and back storage area near soda lines. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
An insect control device was observed installed above stored equipment and food. PIC instructed to move device to an area that reduces risk of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
